The '''Tortali Platform''' was an [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Imperial]] [[XQ3 Platform]] used as a supply platform located in the [[Tortali system/Legends|Tortali system]] of the [[Outer Rim Territories/Legends|Outer Rim Territories]]. It was heavily armed and had a squadron of [[TIE/IN interceptor/Legends|TIE/IN interceptors]] and [[TIE/sa tactical bomber/Legends|TIE/sa bombers]].

==History==
The [[Alliance to Restore the Republic/Legends|Rebel Alliance]] sent a strike force consisting of [[T-65 X-wing starfighter/Legends|T-65 X-wing starfighters]] and [[BTL Y-wing starfighter/Legends|BTL Y-wing starfighters]], with [[RZ-1 A-wing interceptor/Legends|RZ-1 A-wing interceptors]] as backup, intending to destroy it.

{{Station-stub}}

==Appearances==
*''[[Star Wars: X-Wing vs. TIE Fighter]]'' {{1st}}
